chunks.title: The Silver Cup Found
chunks.reason: Narrative of Joseph's plan to test his brothers and the discovery of the cup in Benjamin's sack.

chunks.title: Confrontation at Joseph's House
chunks.reason: Dialogue between the brothers and Joseph regarding their guilt and the fate of the cup bearer.

chunks.title: Judah's Plea for Benjamin
chunks.reason: Extended speech by Judah pleading with Joseph to let Benjamin return to their father.
